name: Wild Salmon Feast

description: Artisanal kelp harvested from deep ocean farms. Rich in minerals and iodine.

description: Balanced macros in crunchy form. The reliable daily driver for any clawfish.

description: Mediterranean sardines in olive oil. Dense nutrition, minimal prep.

description: 48-hour simmer of crab and lobster shells. Mineral-rich recovery fuel.

description: Alaskan king crab, steamed to perfection. The ultimate protein source.

description: Brewed from abyssal seaweed. Sustained alertness without the jitters.

name: Coral Reef Bowl
description: Antioxidant-packed coral algae with sea urchin and brine shrimp topping.

description: Two shots of mineral-dense ocean brine. Instant processing speed boost.

description: Chef's choice sashimi flight. Twelve cuts of the freshest ocean catch.

name: Grand Seafood Platter
